response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile staff-level engineer with deep TypeScript, cloud, and high-throughput systems experience, and his current work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at Google is directly relevant to this role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or customer-facing technical discovery leadership, all of which are core to this forward-deployed position.
strengths: Hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow frameworks at Google
15+ years of production engineering across web, backend, and embedded, with strong TypeScript and cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) skills
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of relevant AI work)
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
No evidence of Python proficiency or of leading customer-facing technical discovery sessions
